Creates a simple dialog to confirm the stopping of heart rate sharing with a timeout setting.

# Purpose
This code defines a function [`ble_hrm_stop_sharing_popup_create`](<#ble_hrm_stop_sharing_popup_create>) that creates and configures a simple dialog to inform the user that heart rate monitoring has stopped sharing. It uses the `SimpleDialog` structure from the `simple_dialog` library to create a dialog with the title "Stopped Sharing." The dialog displays a message retrieved through internationalization functions, indicating "Heart Rate Not Shared," and sets an icon using a resource identifier `RESOURCE_ID_BLE_HRM_NOT_SHARED`. The dialog is configured to automatically close after a timeout defined by `BLE_HRM_CONFIRMATION_TIMEOUT_MS`, which is set to 2000 milliseconds. The function returns a pointer to the created `SimpleDialog` object.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `ble_hrm_stop_sharing_popup.h`
- `applib/ui/dialogs/simple_dialog.h`
- `resource/resource_ids.auto.h`
- `services/common/i18n/i18n.h`
- `util/time/time.h`


# Functions

---
### ble\_hrm\_stop\_sharing\_popup\_create<!-- {{#callable:ble_hrm_stop_sharing_popup_create}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/popups/ble_hrm/ble_hrm_stop_sharing_popup.c#L26>)

Creates and configures a `SimpleDialog` to inform the user that heart rate sharing has stopped.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Call `simple_dialog_create` with the title 'Stopped Sharing' to create a `SimpleDialog`.
    - Retrieve the `Dialog` object from the `SimpleDialog` using `simple_dialog_get_dialog`.
    - Get the localized message 'Heart Rate Not Shared' using `i18n_get` and set it as the dialog text with `dialog_set_text`.
    - Set the dialog icon to `RESOURCE_ID_BLE_HRM_NOT_SHARED` using `dialog_set_icon`.
    - Set the dialog timeout to `BLE_HRM_CONFIRMATION_TIMEOUT_MS` using `dialog_set_timeout`.
    - Disable icon animation in the `SimpleDialog` using [`simple_dialog_set_icon_animated`](<../../applib/ui/dialogs/simple_dialog.c.md#simple_dialog_set_icon_animated>).
    - Free the localized message string using `i18n_free`.
    - Return the configured `SimpleDialog`.
- **Output**: A pointer to the configured `SimpleDialog` object.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`simple_dialog_set_icon_animated`](<../../applib/ui/dialogs/simple_dialog.c.md#simple_dialog_set_icon_animated>)
